name: Bittersweet Chocolate Moons
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Recipes from the Night Kitchen 1991 Preparation Time: 1:30
1. Combine all ingredients in a cuisinart and blend until a dough forms.
2. Chill for one hour.
3. Shape into 12 balls and form into crescent moon shapes.
4. Bake at 300°F on an ungreased cookie sheet for 15 to 20 minutes.
